name: 2q13_recurrent_CNV_region
description: 2q13 recurrent microdeletion/microduplication region flanked by directly oriented segmental duplications mediating NAHR. Associated with variable phenotype including developmental delay, cardiac defects (NPHP1 nephronophthisis is the better-known recessive disorder at a partly overlapping locus).

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SD pair with >95% identity over 50-100 kb, mediating recurrent ~1.7 Mb CNVs; contains MALL, NPHP1, BUB1 paralogs; nearby 2q13 RGPD gene family extends the paralog complexity.
